scripts.skin:dev: npm run skin:shim && npm run dev
scripts.skin:dev:device: npm run skin:shim:device && npm run dev:lan
scripts.skin:deploy: npm run build && npm run validate:manifest && node scripts/deploy-skin.mjs
scripts.build: tsc --noEmit && GIT_COMMIT=$(git rev-parse --short HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo dev) vite build
scripts.release:zip: rm -f beanie-v$npm_package_version.zip && npm run build && npm run validate:manifest && (cd dist && zip -r ../beanie-v$npm_package_version.zip . -x '*.DS_Store' '*/.DS_Store')
